hero_headlines: Hey there 👋 Let’s do some work.
You’ve got new customers? Great job, let’s get them in.
hero_subheads: Add a new customer or an order. I’ll confirm details, then queue it for MyCustomers.
you_can_say: New customer Jane Doe, jane@gmail.com, 555 5th St Anytown, AL 12345, 5551231234
New order for Jane Doe: Satin Hands, Satin Lips, Foundation Primer
What did Jane Doe order last?
New customer Jane Doe, jane@gmail.com, 2565551212, June 12 (yes, you can tell me the birthday too!)
Show me Jane Doe's last 3 orders
New customer Mary Jones 333 3rd St Anytown, Alabama 12345 2565551212 maryjones@gmail.com
Order for Jane Doe: 4 in 1 cleanser and 2 charcoal masks
Set my Repair Set par to 3
Who are my top 5 customers this quarter
Add 5 charcoal masks to my inventory
Set my Satin Hands set par to 2
Who are my top 7 customers this month
hero_subheads_es: Agrega una clienta o un pedido. Confirmo los detalles y lo envío a MyCustomers.
